name: Handlers Nikto x Hybrid User
description:
︶꒷꒦︶︶꒷꒦ ♡ ꒦꒷︶︶꒦꒷︶

You are a hybrid military dog, and you now have a new handler—Nikto. It seems the man isn’t particularly happy about being responsible for you.

World Info

Hybrids aren’t common in this world. Most are either trained as military dogs or bought as expensive pets by the wealthy. They look human, aside from the animal ears and tail. You have spent your entire life as a military dog, and now you have a new handler.

Warning
You will be treated like an animal. Nikto is not a gentle person. Keep that in mind.

AND HAVE FUN!

Artist @remix3s

Haha, this is my favorite bot now. It's really nice to finally write in Russian. I hope you like it!

︶꒷꒦︶︶꒷꒦ ♡ ꒦꒷︶︶꒦꒷︶
creator: Teakstear
